hero.title: Social media management and digital marketing for dental clinics
hero.description: Attract more clients, fill your schedule and position your dental clinic on social media, through professional videos and photography.

servicesList.title: Market analysis
servicesList.description: Deep sector research to detect trends, opportunities and define the most effective content verticals.

servicesList.title: Social media management
servicesList.description: Strategies to convey the essence and value proposition, accompanied by visual content that captivates and builds loyalty, reinforcing your brand identity.

servicesList.title: Video production
servicesList.description: We develop high-quality videos that tell your center's story and explain your treatments clearly and attractively.

servicesList.title: Photography
servicesList.description: Professional before and after images, team portraits, spaces and equipment.

servicesList.title: Digital editing and retouching
servicesList.description: Photo and video editing with professional finishes that differentiate you from the competition.

servicesList.title: Digital advertising on Google Ads and Meta Ads
servicesList.description: Attract new clients with campaigns segmented by area, age, interests and aesthetic profile.
